EquippableItemDefinition__BoardingBlade_: A pirate's boarding tool, equally useful for boarding ships as ripping open chests of booty. Grants {0} more korona from defeated enemies.
EquippableItemDefinition__SimpleBasket__: Increases Stamina by {0} while working on the farm.
EquippableItemDefinition__RingOfTrustOme: Shares half of any damage received by a party member wearing a Ring Of Trust (Alpha).
EquippableItemDefinition__SailorsGooGrab: Equipped monster will increase plankton productivity by {0} while on the farm.
EquippableItemDefinition__Stereoscope__d: Prism's ocular enhancing invention that increases Intuition by {0}.
EquippableItemDefinition__VisageOfFreebo: A pirate's mask that intimidates others into giving up their gold and valuables... after a little roughing up. Increases Korona dropped by enemies by {0}.
SimpleItemDefinition__GoldniumHaircomb__: Too soft to actually perform its function, still a priceless work of art!
SimpleItemDefinition__StoneshellCarapace: A flexible, yet incredibly tough, material shed by Cyclops as they grow. Has incredible shock absorbtion properties.
SimpleItemDefinition__LuminescentFlower_: A beautiful blossom, no imperfections, a truly once and a lifetime flower. Belongs in a botany lab.
SimpleItemDefinition__GlimmeringScale__d: Harvested from Lamia, who often cast off these glittering scales, which retain the hypnotic, light bending qualities of their origin.
SimpleItemDefinition__ShardsDull__descri: Shards cast off from a Demon as they shift back to their less massive form from their full Demon one. Highly conductive to magic.
SimpleItemDefinition__Holy Milk Agatha I: A sweet and nutritious treat from devout Holstaur acolytes. It is also the bathwater of choice for Heifer Priests. Holy cow!
SimpleItemDefinition__DullLeyAcumen__des: Produced by the flux of energies surrounding a dragon as it interacts with the ley lines of an island, especially in moments of extreme pleasure or excitement.
SimpleItemDefinition__FossilizedStorehou: A beautiful work of art. A commentary on longing and being out of place with one's purpose.
SimpleItemDefinition__Rekk's Junk__descr: One man's trash is another man's treasure. So they say, anyway.
SimpleItemDefinition__MedicalSupplies__d: Sutures, anti-septic, a sewing kit hypodermic needles, hemostatic powder, bandages, painkillers and candy. A must have for the frontier medico.
SimpleItemDefinition__CrummyDice__descri: Not only is it unbalanced and apparently carved from soap, but it only has 1s.
SimpleItemDefinition__Wata Agatha Ingred: A marvelous all-in-one food. It's seeds firm, nutty and creamy, its flesh delicately fruity and tart!
SimpleItemDefinition__PlanktonFungiMater: Great for Plankton, not so much for anything else.
SimpleItemDefinition__Stone__description: Harvested from more barren islands and dungeons. Stones from sky islands quickly lose their bouyancy after quarrying, but are essential for larger structures.
SimpleItemDefinition__DiamondniumGrogFla: Dusty, ill used. Extremely valuable, crafted from pure diamondium blocks, a true pirate's drinking apparatus.
SimpleItemDefinition__EmbroideredDoorHin: Etched not embroidered, though from the intricacy of the acid work you'd be hard pressed to think otherwise.
SimpleItemDefinition__SpiritShard__descr: A glimmering sliver of something, turn it in to Sebastian for something nice.
SimpleItemDefinition__Metal__description: Most commonly found in volcanic class dungeons. Various kinds of ore are found on sky islands, often smelted into usable and pure metals that in turn can be forged into structural supports and tools.
SimpleItemDefinition__BlueprintNeoIncuba: Blueprints for a more advanced Incubator.
SimpleItemDefinition__AvianFeather__desc: Harvested from the wings, tails, and heads of Harpies. They make fantastic fletching, decoration, and quills.
SimpleItemDefinition__Wizard Artifact -: Some form of information storage device the Wizards use.
SimpleItemDefinition__PlanktonNestingMat: The most intact pieces of a plankton nest ransacked by pirates. Perhaps someone knowledgeable about plankton can use it?
SimpleItemDefinition__Wood__description: Commonly harvested from forest dungeons, but found on almost every isle. There are as many kinds of trees out there as there are islands in the sky, but many are similar, and wood is central to most Central Kingdom industries.
SimpleItemDefinition__PieceOfCrap__descr: You're not sure what this is, but it's definitely garbage.
SimpleItemDefinition__OverpricedKey__des: Can you believe how much you paid for this thing?
SimpleItemDefinition__SadPlanktonKey__de: Somehow you know this plankton is dealing with a lot of emotional issues. They could probably channel that into a limited run magical realism novel. Or, you could just reunite it with its mate. That might improve its day.
SimpleItemDefinition__Holstaur Holy Bell: A stolen fragment of the sacred Holstaur bell, Ila will appreciate its return!
SimpleItemDefinition__BlueprintPlanktonP: Plans for building a Plankton Pen on your farm. Show this to Lucia in town.
SimpleItemDefinition__Saviar Agatha Ingr: Tender flesh with a glaze-like outer coating. The Saviar's flavors are earthy, savory and deeply luxurious.
SimpleItemDefinition__PieceOfCrapUltra__: You're not sure what this is, but it's definitely garbage coated in still wet gold paint.
SimpleItemDefinition__Chuku Agatha Ingre: While edible on it's own, a chuku is best used by disassembling it down into various spices and garnishes.
SimpleItemDefinition__BlueprintLeyEngine: Looks like some kind of complex magi-tech diagram. You have no hope of comprehending these plans.
SimpleItemDefinition__CanineFang__descri: Harvested from Wolves, who frequently outgrow and regrow new fangs, so frequently do they gnaw on both objects and foes.
SimpleItemDefinition__CrustaceanDebris__: Regularly shed by crabs, this tough, inflexible material is incredibly light and deflects most blows or trauma.
SimpleItemDefinition__EquineHair__descri: Hair taken from the mane and tail of Centaurs. As soft as down, but tough as granite.
SimpleItemDefinition__FelyneClaw__descri: Harvested from Cats, which they frequently crack then grow back. Very valuable for their sharpness.
SimpleItemDefinition__KimericMateria__de: A byproduct of Chimera, produced as old forms are sloughed off and new ones taken on. This valuable alchemical material can be used in the creation of varied and potent products based on how it is influenced.
SimpleItemDefinition__BlastingCharge__de: A set of highly unstable alchemical sticks. They are more efficient, but less stable, than essence based explosives. Most mining and quarrying concerns produce them on site from local biproducts.
SimpleItemDefinition__Boethilde'sDoll__d: Found in Boethilde's Mirror World lair, it seems to have some incredible significance to her. It is bitterly cold to the touch, as though frozen in time.
SimpleItemDefinition__BoomKey__descripti: A simple black metal key, the shape and size seem to fit with the chain supporting pillars dotting the Savannah.
SimpleItemDefinition__BoozantRawcore__de: An extremely sturdy wild produce of a boozant tree, impossible to cultivate domestically, harder still to crack open. Perhaps the centaurs know of some way to access its contents.
SimpleItemDefinition__BoozantRawcoreCrac: An extremely sturdy wild produce of a boozant tree, impossible to cultivate domestically. It has been cracked open oozing a thick, viscous ichor that burns the skin when touched.
SimpleItemDefinition__CatRelic__descript: A stone carved in a shape of a.. yarn ball? Seems to be of some significance to the wild catfolk.
SimpleItemDefinition__Compound Key Card_: This piece of technology appears to be important, and tied to the Vaskin Robbins Corporation. It's probably very important!
SimpleItemDefinition__CrumblingKeyFragme: This mysterious fragment might become relevant soon. [FUTURE CONTENT]
It seems to be missing some pieces. [FUTURE CONTENT]
It seems to be missing some pieces. [FUTURE CONTENT]
It seems to be missing some pieces. [FUTURE CONTENT]
It seems to be missing some pieces. [FUTURE CONTENT]
It seems to be missing some pieces. [FUTURE CONTENT]
SimpleItemDefinition__DaedalusMap__descr: This Map describes a cavern behind a waterfall where something valuable can be found, apparently written, or at least found, by Daedalus. [Future Update]
SimpleItemDefinition__DullLeyAcumenCryst: This crystal throbs dully with echoes of the power it once held. It could be used to interact with ley-powered constructs, such as doors.
SimpleItemDefinition__EpochPage__descrip: A page thrumming with magic, enough of them can open gate ways to mythical realms.
SimpleItemDefinition__Holstaur Cow Costu: A collection of various costumes to "fit in" better with Holstaurs. They're not very fashionable, but they may have some other purposes...
SimpleItemDefinition__Hypothermal Cell__: A strange piece of magitech that slots perfectly into the genodriver. It radiates a supernatural chill.
SimpleItemDefinition__Soap__description: Liable to wash away any gunk and grime. Don't drop it!
SimpleItemDefinition__StoneWeel__descrip: You've heard of artisanal speedweels, but this is just ridiculous.
SimpleItemDefinition__Amber__description: A relatively rare substance made from fossilized tree sap. Moderately valuable to merchants and craftsmen.
SimpleItemDefinition__Amethyst__descript: A rare gemstone of purple hue. Fairly valuable to merchants and craftsment.
SimpleItemDefinition__Emerald__descripti: An exceedingly rare gemstone of green hue. Very valuable to merchants and craftsmen.
SimpleItemDefinition__GoldOreNuggets__de: An incredibly rare, but soft metal. Highly valued for its malleability and rarity, as well as applications in magitek.
SimpleItemDefinition__UnknownFlask__desc: A mysterious empty flask with prominent symbol etched into the surface.
OtherFoodItemDefinition__HolidayPizza__d: Chunks of savory meat, thick cheese, spicy sauce, and assorted bits of green vegetable. And of course the crust, sure to fill you up!
OtherFoodItemDefinition__CreepyCustard__: This quivering flimflan and jelbabu based treat is practically trying to wiggle right out of its container! With its sweet, salacious, caramel glaze it's nowhere near creepy enough to avoid taking a spoon to it~
OtherFoodItemDefinition__Terremoto__desc: Sweet wine, ice-cream, and a dash of sweet red juice. Alcoholic, refreshing, and energizing! A popular drink in the warmer regions of the world.
OtherFoodItemDefinition__HughMungus__des: This teasingly taunting, meaty, monstrosity of a burger is guaranteed to satiate any monstrous appetite! Made with a scrubstick and bose blend patty, mando fries, a fried plankton egg and topped by two swirly cuts of eggtrap for zest.
OtherFoodItemDefinition__Pavlova__descri: Meringue clinging to a shell of light, crisp, pastry stuffed with sweet berries and topped with slices of green fruit. Named for a popular dancer from the central kingdom.
OtherFoodItemDefinition__NotPocket__desc: A spicy flour tortilla wrap fit to burst. Packed with zesty eggtrap, scrambled plankton eggs, bose, and diced shrubstick marinated in demon tail sauce! Don't worry, it's just a really spicy type of pepper.
OtherFoodItemDefinition__ScarySnackums__: A thick canmello-cocoa coated candybar. Stuffed with honey roasted grownut nougat and double chilled crementin. Scary? Not really. Scrumptious? Absolutely!
OtherFoodItemDefinition__BooBleGum__desc: This seemingly innocent ball of plemon and jelbabu candy has been possessed! Well, not possessed. More like a ghost happened to pass through the crate of Boo-ble Gum. Blowing a bubble reveals a ghastly fanged face!
OtherFoodItemDefinition__DiggenBrownies_: A chunk of fudge capped with dense creme-cheese. Topping it all off is a lovingly sculpted dark cocoa gravestone with a drizzling of gempas and lavapple blended preserves.
OtherFoodItemDefinition__DreadBread__des: That crusty, flaky face pockmarked by chunks of crispy boson. Eyes and mouth all oozing with molten, gooey, cheese. Pure visage of delectable anguish. What a fright! Now take a bite~
OtherFoodItemDefinition__Jackavapple__de: A sweet and Savory treat stuffed with mysterious soft sour chews, overflowing with spiced cream infused juice. Eat it, drink it, do it!
OtherFoodItemDefinition__ScremeBars__des: A grownut and creme packed candybar contained by a thin layer of milk canmello-cocoa. So sensually sweet, it'll make you scream AND cream!
OtherFoodItemDefinition__SpookyCookie__d: A crumbly speedwheel and flour based cookie with a crementin creme frosting. Spooky scary skeleton indeed!
OtherFoodItemDefinition__CloudburstStars: Amazingly, this savory Starshine can be drank by itself, or used as a sauce to compliment a main dish.
OtherFoodItemDefinition__HealthyShake__d: Does this make it a meal now?
OtherFoodItemDefinition__MindseyeStarshi: This is a Starshine who's taste will linger on your tongue for hours, but not at the expense of its alcoholic content!
OtherFoodItemDefinition__PeerlessStarshi: This Starshine will taste like it's made from concentrated juice. It's not the flavor that will get you, it's the burn!
OtherFoodItemDefinition__RapidroidStarsh: This particular Starshine will make your face twist up in masochistic delight thanks to its sour punch!
OtherFoodItemDefinition__StalwartStarshi: The classic way to enjoy Starshine, uncomplicated, highly alcoholic, and enough for an entire party of one.
OtherFoodItemDefinition__StoutheartStars: This sweet Starshine tastes almost like a fruity beverage! Drink too much though, and you are liable to forget the next day.
EssenceItemDefinition__BlastCell__descri: Blast Cells are harvested from Cyclops. Commonly used as a summer fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__ViceCell__descrip: Vice Cells are harvested from Lamia. Commonly used as a winter fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__EruptingCell__des: Erupting Cells are harvested from Demons. Commonly used as a summer fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__StrongCell__descr: Strong Cells are harvested from Holstaurs. Commonly used as a spring fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__TremorCell__descr: Tremor Cells are harvested from Centaurs. Commonly used as a autumn fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__GaleCell__descrip: Gale Cells are harvested from Harpies. Commonly used as a spring fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__JoyousCell__descr: Joyous cells are harvested from Cats. Commonly used as an autumn fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__EchoCell__descrip: Echo Cells are harvested from Crabs. Commonly used as a winter fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__EpochEquillibrium: This substance came from a god. When poured onto a plant, it will grow instantly to full ripeness, as if it had been perfectly tended.
EssenceItemDefinition__MaxCell__descript: Max Cells are harvested from Dragons. Commonly used as an universal fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__NeoCell__descript: Neo Cells are harvested from Chimera. Commonly used as an universal fertilizer.
EssenceItemDefinition__WildCell__descrip: Wild Cells are harvested from Wolves. Commonly used as a universal fertilizer.

RandomBundleDefinition__ProvisionDayPres: A wrapped box of bountiful bien. Open it up and see what's inside!
RandomBundleDefinition__HallowHauntGoodi: Open to find an assortment of Hallow's Haunt goodies!
SingleOutputPlanktonItemDefinition__Plan: Hard shell, meaty inner core. Leaves suspicious fruits in its wake. Take care lest its bounty be eaten by its kin.
Produces chewy chunks of raw meat-like substance when properly tended to. Scholars ask why, you ask where the panko is.
Sheds crunchy, watery leaves on an almost daily basis. Make sure to expose the leaves to cold for a maximum of crunch.
Fat, jiggly, and surprisingly heavy. Often leaves behind seedpods. Some people like to drink its gooey sweat for a quick boost of energy.
Place over a jar and squeeze regularly lest it become bloated and self important. A useful if somewhat loud plankton to have around.
Wherever it goes it leaves a dusty of fine spores. If left to their own devices they'll grow into fat, juice mushrooms.
A simple minded creature, motivated only to feed and reproduce. Lays lots of eggs, make sure it doesn't figure out how tasty its own eggs are. (or itself for that matter.)
A glimmering creature that lights up the pen at night. Extrudes a thick, meaty lump every now and again that can be butchered for a modest cut of meat.
A quiet thing that occasionally makes a loud peeping noise. Typically leaves large, heavy egg like objects full of something suspiciously similar to chocolate. Most won't know the difference.
Covers itself with salt as a defence mechanism to protect itself from predators. Useful source of that substance though removing the coating can be time consuming.
A fragrant thing that leaves a powder of dust wherever it goes. Make sure to frequently pat it down with a feather duster and collect its leavings.
A gooey little mess of a thing. Don't be afraid to harvest its goods with a squeeze. Be prepared for a mess though?
CookedItemDefinition__Noodles__descripti: Chewy on their own, but versatile in other dishes
CookedItemDefinition__Bitecake__descript: It's so delectable and tiny that you can never stop at just one. Time to make some more?
CookedItemDefinition__BreadPudding__desc: You don't think many people are going to enjoy this. But it could be an excellent doorstop.
CookedItemDefinition__ButterTarts__descr: A bite sized sweet snack. Add some fruit if you want to feel a little better about your food choices.
CookedItemDefinition__CamellowFondant__d: So rich in taste but so good.
CookedItemDefinition__Candystick__descri: A fantastic sweet treat if you're not fond of the fried bose. Keep plenty on hand for that sugar buzz.
CookedItemDefinition__CaramelCone__descr: Don't even attempt to protect your hands from this. Just eat as quickly as you can and accept what comes next.
CookedItemDefinition__Chocobite__descrip: Perfect balance of cake and chocolate. Perfect for all ages.
CookedItemDefinition__ChocolateCremepie_: Basically ice cream cake. Which is the best kind of cake.
CookedItemDefinition__ChwonKasha__descri: A grain-like treat which is probably the least sugary thing out of all your dessert recipes. Good on you for making this.
CookedItemDefinition__Cobbler__descripti: Is it a pie or is it a cake? Doesn't matter, just eat it and enjoy.
CookedItemDefinition__Cookiepie__descrip: You couldn't be bothered making a regular pie so you made this. Good choice, cookies always make things better.
CookedItemDefinition__CremeRoll__descrip: The cutest dessert you will ever make. It's so dang cute, can you even bring yourself to eat it?
CookedItemDefinition__CremeSandwich__des: It's like a sundae but crammed into a sandwich. It's a win/win situation.
CookedItemDefinition__CremetineYoghurt__: A creamy cold treat that makes you feel like you're at least attempting to eat a little healthier.
CookedItemDefinition__CrystantSourjam__d: This is the sort of thing that only a select amount of people enjoy. You don't know if you're one of those people.
CookedItemDefinition__DunkerSundae__desc: A thicker sundae that's about the size of your head.
CookedItemDefinition__FlimmedFlan__descr: It's like custard but hardened just enough into a gelatinous goo.
CookedItemDefinition__FondantBurger__des: It's a burger but sweet. You're a genius!
CookedItemDefinition__ForbiddenFruit__de: Hopefully eating this doesn't upset the balance of power or order of things. It looks tasty.
CookedItemDefinition__GempasSweetCremeCa: A nice treat to celebrate someone's existence. Or just your own.
CookedItemDefinition__GempasSweetjam__de: A jar of jam that can be eaten on its own or spread on various other desserts.
CookedItemDefinition__Gingerwhale__descr: It's an adorable cookie in the shape of a whale. You could eat like ten of these.
CookedItemDefinition__GrownutBun__descri: Prepare your hands to get very sticky. Honestly, you're probably used to that feeling by now.
CookedItemDefinition__HottonHalva__descr: Sweet chunky bread that you can either cut pieces off of or rip off at your leisure.
CookedItemDefinition__JellypoundCake__de: A gelatinous mound that you'd get stuck in if you put your finger in it. It's advised that you don't do that.
CookedItemDefinition__LavappleHotjam__de: Yikes, this was an ambitious creation. For those that like a little spice to life.
CookedItemDefinition__LavappleWholepie__: Just like a parental figure used to make. It's a little hotter than you remember.
CookedItemDefinition__Lavapplepie__descr: And you thought meat pies were hot. Blow on this before consumption.
CookedItemDefinition__Mooncake__descript: It's like eating a puffy cloud. Shouldn't it be a cloudcake then?
CookedItemDefinition__NeopolitanCremepie: It's so much cream. A mountain of cream. It will overwhelm your mouth with every bite. Why is there so much cream?
CookedItemDefinition__NotBalls__descript: You made round sweet treats definitely not in the shape of something that reminds you of your farming activities.
CookedItemDefinition__Pacoca__descriptio: Might get stuck in your teeth but at least you'll be able to relive the taste for the rest of the day.
CookedItemDefinition__Pancakes__descript: A classic breakfast choice. Or lunch. Or dinner. It can be whatever you want it to be.
CookedItemDefinition__PlemonTart__descri: Hard to eat but you're not backing down from a challenge. Or give it to your friends to watch their mouths go funny.
CookedItemDefinition__PoachedPlemon__des: You're not entirely sure what you just made. But all the other stuff tastes good so this probably does too.
CookedItemDefinition__Rockchewers__descr: Warning - will make you eat your own mouth. But you'll keep eating them purely for that thrill.
CookedItemDefinition__Sakotis__descripti: It's like a tree branch but you can eat it.
CookedItemDefinition__ScoopedPlemon__des: A lighter dessert with a bit of a kick of an aftertaste.
CookedItemDefinition__SkolfruitBitterJam: Extremely bitter Skolfruit jam preserve for those daring enough to try it, its bitter taste suppressed by copious amounts of sugar put into it.
CookedItemDefinition__SpeedwheelDunker__: A doughy snack covered in a sugary substance. You could eat a six pack of these.
CookedItemDefinition__SpiceCookies__desc: For when you need your cookies to have more of a bite to them.
CookedItemDefinition__SpongeLayercake__d: Every time you take a bite, the cream will explode out of the sides. You've had practice, it should be fine.
CookedItemDefinition__StuffedPlemon__des: Just pop the top off and dip your finger in. It's just that simple.
CookedItemDefinition__Sundae__descriptio: Perfect for if you're having a really bad day or a really good day. Be careful of that brainfreeze.
CookedItemDefinition__SurpriseCreme__des: This is probably edible. Maybe you'll even get a prize? Hopefully the prize isn't death.
CookedItemDefinition__Tart__description: Your mouth will begin salivating before it even reaches your lips.
CookedItemDefinition__TheBigJabroni__des: A classic recipe made better. Eating this makes you feel like a young'un again.
CookedItemDefinition__WhaleChewer__descr: Not your regular kind of treat. A little on the tangy side but yummy nonetheless.
CookedItemDefinition__Ambrosia__descript: Makes you feel like your lifespan expanded a little bit after drinking this.
CookedItemDefinition__BernardBeer__descr: You can hear the echoing of 'scull, scull, scull' as you stare down this drink.
CookedItemDefinition__Bittershake__descr: Perfect when you need a pick-me-up in those hot mornings.
CookedItemDefinition__BlanbalaExtract__d: Strong as hell but with a fruity aftertaste.
CookedItemDefinition__BoozantButterbeer_: Careful, a little too many of these and you could wake up naked in the barn. But maybe that's what you want?
CookedItemDefinition__ChocolateMilk__des: This is for when things just get a little too much and you need to feel like you're five again. Comfort drink.
CookedItemDefinition__Cloudvardier__desc: Live life dangerously. Drink the fire concoction.
CookedItemDefinition__ColtusBitterbrew__: A good stiff drink in a regular sense but also handy when it's a little nippy outside.
CookedItemDefinition__CremeSoda__descrip: Makes you forget you're even drinking booze because it's just so light and foamy.
CookedItemDefinition__CrystantCarbonade_: You don't need the taste to be masked with sugar, down the sour drink - do it, do it, do it!
CookedItemDefinition__CrystantTequila__d: Can't go wrong with a simple classic drink at the end of a busy day.
CookedItemDefinition__Eggnog__descriptio: Drinking this always reminds you of the holidays.
CookedItemDefinition__Flip__description: It's fancy but it's not too fancy.
CookedItemDefinition__Float__description: Drinking this will certainly make you feel like you're floating.
CookedItemDefinition__FruitParfait__desc: It's a dessert that you could also eat for breakfast. Treat yourself.
CookedItemDefinition__GempasFruitshake__: A healthy smoothie sure to put a buzz in your step.
CookedItemDefinition__GempasNectar__desc: Bursting with flavour but perhaps a little too much flavour. Have water handy.
CookedItemDefinition__GempasPlemonade__d: Sour flavor is a surprise, since the beverage's bright color reminds drinkers of gempas.
CookedItemDefinition__IceCoffee__descrip: A cool drink in a cool cup that you can eat when you're done.
CookedItemDefinition__JelbabuJuice__desc: Bring this out to your hard working animals when they're feeling parched.
CookedItemDefinition__JellyShakeChoco__d: Chocolate makes everything better. It releases endorphines. And those make you happy.
CookedItemDefinition__JellyShakeFruit__d: Bursting with jelly and flavour and maybe a hole or two in your teeth. Worth it.
CookedItemDefinition__JellyShakeSyrup__d: Diabetes in a cup. Don't have these too often.
CookedItemDefinition__LavappleCider__des: Resist the urge to swirl this, you might burn your wrist a little.
CookedItemDefinition__LavappleMagmasala_: Is it supposed to be smoking? Well, this will be interesting going down. Even more interesting if it comes back up.
CookedItemDefinition__LightBoozeshake__d: It's like booze but its lighter and creamy and makes you forget that you're drinking something that will likely make you pass out if you have too many.
CookedItemDefinition__MaiTai__descriptio: For some reason, this makes you feel exotic.
CookedItemDefinition__Mead__description: This makes you feel like a powerful pirate about to plunder some booty.
CookedItemDefinition__Milktea__descripti: You feel like it's missing some chewy extra bits in the bottom.
CookedItemDefinition__MulledWine__descri: Better for those with a more defined wine palette. Fun to swirl, though.
CookedItemDefinition__NectarConcentrate_: Drink this when you need a boost to your waking state. Not too many or you will see through time.
CookedItemDefinition__OgrePowerbrew__des: Oof, you're really going to feel this when it kicks in.
CookedItemDefinition__Sangrina__descript: A fruity beverage that makes you forget that this is alcohol. It's just so sweet.
CookedItemDefinition__SkolfruitBitterjui: An acquired taste but those you love it will swear by it. To each their own.
CookedItemDefinition__SmoresBrulee__desc: It was too liquidy to try and eat so you made it a drink instead. But it's a very good drink.
CookedItemDefinition__SourheadBreezer__d: You're salivating already just looking at it.
CookedItemDefinition__SourheadPop__descr: This shouldn't be too hard to throw back.
CookedItemDefinition__Spritzer__descript: It kind of hurts going down but it's a good kind of hurt. Makes you feel alive and very happy.
CookedItemDefinition__Sundowner__descrip: A mix and match of sour and hot with a sweet touch.
CookedItemDefinition__Tea__description: For when you just need to relax a little.
CookedItemDefinition__Yoghurt__descripti: Technically not a drink but it goes down just as smoothly as one.
CookedItemDefinition__BeefstewBurger__de: This probably didn't need to be in between buns. But now it is. Live with your choices.
CookedItemDefinition__BeignetteBurger__d: Originally a pastry but screw it, you made it a burger. Look at you being all innovative.
CookedItemDefinition__BiggunBurger__desc: Just a different variation of burger but with mushrooms. You really like creating burgers.
CookedItemDefinition__BiteBoy__descripti: Itty bitty burger for itty bitty mouths. Or snack sized for a bigger mouth.
CookedItemDefinition__BofrootCubeSteak__: Meat cube. It's a cube of meat. This will suffice as a meal, right?
CookedItemDefinition__BofrootMignon__des: Meat cylinder. Cut it like a cake, that'd be funny.
CookedItemDefinition__BofrootPrimeCut__d: Just a big ol' hunk of meat made from the weird meat you find in the ground. Isn't nature amazing?
CookedItemDefinition__BofrootStew__descr: Make sure to consume only after it has become pleasantly warm. Mouths have been known to burn.
CookedItemDefinition__BreakfastBurger__d: You could eat this for breakfast or you could eat it whenever you want. No one will judge you.
CookedItemDefinition__Carbonara__descrip: Comfort food for when things didn't go quite as planned. You deserve this.
CookedItemDefinition__CheeseStuffedBurge: For when you think, "this burger needed way more cheese."
CookedItemDefinition__ChutneyBurger__des: Congratulations, you managed to somehow get a soup-like substance onto a burger. You're a cooking master.
CookedItemDefinition__ChwonChips__descri: Can't go wrong with chips. Chips are great.
CookedItemDefinition__ColtusSalad__descr: If you're lucky, you may have made this in a way that still retains some of the alcoholic juices.
CookedItemDefinition__CrunchyBoy__descri: Like a regular burger but the bun and the cheese combined to have a cheesy bun baby. Now you have this.
CookedItemDefinition__DeluxeBurger__desc: You essentially deep fried a burger. Was this a good idea? You'll work it off on the farm... probably...
CookedItemDefinition__EggsBenedict__desc: Something about this looks indecent to you but you're not sure why. Nevermind, down the hatch!
CookedItemDefinition__FishFingersandwich: You could eat like five of these. Watch the fingers, they're about to get slimy.
CookedItemDefinition__Foccain__descripti: It's so delicious but bread does make you fat... Eh, you don't care. You'll work it off.
CookedItemDefinition__FriedBose__descrip: Can be eaten on its own or used to make even better things. Recommended use is always keeping some on hand.
CookedItemDefinition__GlazedTurnog__desc: This feels like another big sharing kind of meal. Share with the animals if you wish.
CookedItemDefinition__GreasyBoy__descrip: The best cure after a night out of doing whatever you want. Wear a bib, this will stain your clothes.
CookedItemDefinition__InkBurger__descrip: This was a choice. It's probably healthy. Ink is healthy, right?
CookedItemDefinition__JeldiscBurger__des: Jelly in a burger? Jelly in a burger. Burgers are great no matter what you put on them at this point.
CookedItemDefinition__JerkyBag__descript: Chewy but handy on the go.
CookedItemDefinition__Lasagne__descripti: Ooey gooey goodness that will warm you up from the inside out.
CookedItemDefinition__LayeredSalad__desc: You were going for a trifle but like, a meat kind. Because no one would deliberately do that, right?
CookedItemDefinition__MacAndCheese__desc: Ahhh, everyone has lived off this for at least a week at one point in their lives. Is this your first time?
CookedItemDefinition__MacaroniCheeseBaco: Somehow you made macaroni into a bun. Congratulations, you defied food physics.
CookedItemDefinition__MacrinasNoodles__d: You think back fondly on how all you had to do was squeeze a plant and noodles came out. Cooking is so easy.
CookedItemDefinition__MashedMados__descr: Such a simple meal that shouldn't taste as good as it does.
CookedItemDefinition__Nachos__descriptio: A bowl of yummy goodness that you use chips to eat. And it's covered in cheese. Prepare to get messy.
CookedItemDefinition__NoodleSoup__descri: Easy to make, easy to eat. Noodles are always a great choice. What can't noodles do?
CookedItemDefinition__OctopusBurger__des: A tad on the chewy side but you've never been one to turn down a burger.
CookedItemDefinition__Okonomiyaki__descr: A melt in your mouth savoury pancake made out of all the bits that were just lying around. Isn't cooking magical?
CookedItemDefinition__Pasta__description: What's better than regular noodles? Even bigger noodles.
CookedItemDefinition__PattyMelt__descrip: Make a big slab of the stuff and it'd last you the whole day. But you don't have all day, you want it now.
CookedItemDefinition__Pierogi__descripti: Meat pocket. Pocket full of meat. You will smell like meat later.
CookedItemDefinition__Pizza__description: It's a share size pizza that you're supposed to share. Of course, that's just a suggestion...
CookedItemDefinition__PlankRoll__descrip: Excellent cheese stretch but will burn your chin when the line snaps.
CookedItemDefinition__Pocketpie__descrip: Caution - very hot inside. Stupidly hot. Be careful. Don't bite into this lightly, you will burn your tongue off.
CookedItemDefinition__PoutineBurger__des: So many different flavours that assault you all at once but it's not a bad thing. It's just a lot.
CookedItemDefinition__PretzelBurger__des: Have water on hand because this pretzel burger is going to make you THIRSTY! Just the regular kind, not the horny kind.
CookedItemDefinition__QuadrupleStackedBu: Perhaps the most terrifying thing ever made. Terrifying... but satisfying.
CookedItemDefinition__Quiche__descriptio: Kind of a pretentious meal but still tasty as heck.
CookedItemDefinition__RibeyeBurger__desc: If some sort of restaurant released these as a limited time thing, they would do so well and would always be in high demand to come back.
CookedItemDefinition__Risotto__descripti: It's got a strange sticky and grainy consistency but also sort of creamy. Is it delicious? You think it is.
CookedItemDefinition__Rouladen__descript: Just wrap all the veggies in a meat blanket and ta-dah, you have made this.
CookedItemDefinition__SaladBurger__descr: Take everything about a normal burger and convince yourself you are actually trying to eat healthier by wrapping it in vegetables.
CookedItemDefinition__SalmonFilletBurger: For when you're tired of the regular meat and need something a little fishier. Tastes like the ocean.
CookedItemDefinition__SausageBaconburger: A great cure in the mornings. Or just a fun dinner in the evening. The choice is yours.
CookedItemDefinition__SausageCheesebalEn: Just stick some things together on a stick and call if food. It still looks appetizing, in a way.
CookedItemDefinition__SausageRoll__descr: Looking at this makes you giggle. You filthy animal.
CookedItemDefinition__ScrambledEggtrap__: Classic, simple, easy, painless, straightforward, uncomplicated... it's eggs.
CookedItemDefinition__SearedTurnog__desc: The cookbook recommends you don't try and consume this all by yourself.
CookedItemDefinition__ShrubstickColdcut_: Everyone likes a sandwich. Good on you for making a sandwich.
CookedItemDefinition__ShrubstickDoubledo: Double stacks of meaty deliciousness with cheese that feels like it never stops melting. Have fun picking this out of your teeth.
CookedItemDefinition__ShrubstickEnchilad: A meat explosion that will make your front half very happy. Maybe not the bottom half in a few hours.
CookedItemDefinition__ShrubstickFryburge: It's like a plate of breakfast but way better. Wrapped up in tastyness and ready for the road.
CookedItemDefinition__ShrubstickNuggetPi: Take two great things and mash them together to make perfection. It shall be called nugget pizza and it shall be yours, and it shall be your nugget pizza.
CookedItemDefinition__ShrubstickTendies_: Tends to be a little on the chewy side but you can't go wrong with some good ol' nuggies. Who knew you only needed a plant and flour to create happiness?
CookedItemDefinition__ShrubstickandBofro: The insides ooze out so wonderfully. Why are you into that?
CookedItemDefinition__ShrubstickinRedsau: Fragrant spices, tangy sauce, and crunchy deliciousness, who could ask for more?!
CookedItemDefinition__SimmeredBofroot__d: Cooked to perfection and cut in the most juciest of slices.
CookedItemDefinition__SliderTower__descr: Burgers but little. Perfect for those that can't unhinge their jaw.
CookedItemDefinition__SloppyJoe__descrip: The meat keeps falling out but who cares? Just get more bun and dip it into the meaty slop.
CookedItemDefinition__SlowBofrootBourgui: For when you can't be bothered pouring the wine so you just mix it in with the meat. Good job.
CookedItemDefinition__SnowgrainBurger__d: A tight compact burger that won't fall apart the second you bite into it. That's rare.
CookedItemDefinition__Speedburger__descr: Brilliant idea - stuff meat and cheese inside the savoury wheel. Maybe eat over a plate, this will get messy.
CookedItemDefinition__SpiceBurger__descr: Was this a prank on cooking? Someone probably likes this but they must enjoy not feeling their mouth.
CookedItemDefinition__SteamedMado__descr: It's so lumpy looking. And strangely delicious.
CookedItemDefinition__SteamedSalmon__des: Cooked the fishy taste right out of it. Could almost be confused for regular meat.
CookedItemDefinition__Stuffing__descript: You're missing the bit that this is supposed to go into. Oh well, this is fine on its own as well.
CookedItemDefinition__Tentaburger__descr: You can really taste the suckers on the way down.
CookedItemDefinition__TripleDecker__desc: Ever wanted to know what it would feel like to eat a heart attack? You're about to find out!
CookedItemDefinition__TurnogKebab__descr: The greatest thing you will ever eat when you are highly intoxicated. Any other day it's just okay.
CookedItemDefinition__TurnogMeatPie__des: This would be better with sauce.
CookedItemDefinition__TurnogMelt__descri: An effortless meal at any time of the day. Even works if you're running late to something - it just hangs from your mouth easily.
